name: cardhop-app
description: Cardhop.app workflow guidance plus a bundled local MCP server for contact capture and updates on macOS.

interface.shortDescription: Cardhop.app workflows plus a bundled local MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Bundle Cardhop.app contact-capture guidance with a local MCP server that drives Cardhop through documented macOS integration routes.
defaultPrompt: Use Cardhop.app Socket to add a new contact to Cardhop.
